patches.hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method incorrectly throws an IllegalArgumentException when the trimmed buffer is empty after removing trailing spaces and NULs. This happens when the input buffer contains only spaces and/or NULs.
The bug is caused by the incorrect handling of the maximum octal value. The method should correctly parse the maximum 11-digit octal value without throwing an exception.
The bug is caused by the incorrect handling of the maximum octal value. The method should correctly parse the maximum octal value without throwing an exception.

The bug occurs because the method incorrectly throws an IllegalArgumentException when the trimmed buffer is empty, which can happen if the input buffer contains only spaces or NULs after trimming. The fix involves checking if the start index has reached the end index before attempting to process the buffer.

The bug is caused by the incorrect handling of the trailing space/NUL character. The method throws an exception when it encounters a valid octal number followed by a space or NUL, which should be allowed.
